nasb.text: after hearing about Jesus, she came up in the crowd behind Him and touched His cloak.

esv.text: She had heard the reports about Jesus and came up behind him in the crowd and touched his garment.

cnv.text: 她聽見耶穌的事，就從後面來雜在人群中間，摸耶穌的衣服。

ccb.text: 她听见耶稣的事，就夹在人群中挤到耶稣背后摸祂的衣服，

csbs.text: 她听说了耶稣的事，就夹在人群中，从后面摸了一下耶稣的衣服，
